title: 2014 CS Ice Challenge

infobox.value: was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") held in November 2014 at the Liebenauer Eishalle in [Graz](/wiki/Graz "Graz"), [Austria](/wiki/Austria "Austria"). It was part of the [2014–15 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_ISU_Challenger_Series "2014–15 ISU Challenger Series"). Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").

The **2014 [Ice Challenge](/wiki/Ice_Challenge "Ice Challenge")** was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition") held in November 2014 at the Liebenauer Eishalle in [Graz](/wiki/Graz "Graz"), [Austria](/wiki/Austria "Austria"). It was part of the [2014–15 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_ISU_Challenger_Series "2014–15 ISU Challenger Series"). Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").
